mapper.select:
select b.buyer_id "buyerId" , b.buyer_name "buyerName" , b.lprod_gu "lprodGu" , b.buyer_bank "buyerBank" , b.buyer_bankno "buyerBankno" , b.buyer_bankname "buyerBankname" , b.buyer_zip "buyerZip" , b.buyer_add1 "buyerAdd1" , b.buyer_add2 "buyerAdd2" , b.buyer_comtel "buyerComtel" , b.buyer_fax "buyerFax" , b.buyer_mail "buyerMail" , b.buyer_charger "buyerCharger"
, l.lprod_id "lprod.lprodId" , l.lprod_gu "lprod.lprodGu" , l.lprod_name "lprod.lprodName" from buyer b inner join lprod l on b.lprod_gu = l.lprod_gu

with buyer_view as ( select b.* , l.lprod_id "lprod.lprodId" , l.lprod_gu "lprod.lprodGu" , l.lprod_name "lprod.lprodName" from buyer b inner join lprod l on b.lprod_gu = l.lprod_gu where b.buyer_id = #{buyerId} ) select bv.*, p.* from buyer_view bv left outer join prod p on (p.buyer_id = bv.buyer_id)

select b.buyer_id "buyerId" , b.buyer_name "buyerName" , b.lprod_gu "lprodGu" , b.buyer_bank "buyerBank" , b.buyer_bankno "buyerBankno" , b.buyer_bankname "buyerBankname" , b.buyer_zip "buyerZip" , b.buyer_add1 "buyerAdd1" , b.buyer_add2 "buyerAdd2" , b.buyer_comtel "buyerComtel" , b.buyer_fax "buyerFax" , b.buyer_mail "buyerMail" , b.buyer_charger "buyerCharger" , l.lprod_id "lprod.lprodId" , l.lprod_gu "lprod.lprodGu" , l.lprod_name "lprod.lprodName" from buyer b inner join lprod l on b.lprod_gu = l.lprod_gu where b.lprod_gu = #{lprodGu}
